name: Living Spaces
description: Living rooms and shared spaces with a focus on style, comfort, layout, and finishing details.

name: Bedrooms
description: Bedrooms, guest rooms, and nurseries with a focus on comfort, lighting, and softness.

description: Kitchens, dining rooms, and breakfast corners with practical and visual styling guidance.

description: Entryways, laundry rooms, bathrooms, and home offices where function and style overlap.

description: Seasonal decor updates, timely refreshes, and holiday-adjacent styling moments.

name: Outdoor Living
description: Patios, balconies, and outdoor corners designed with comfort, texture, and atmosphere.

name: Decor Foundations
description: Textures, materials, palettes, and core styling systems that support many rooms.
